verses.latin_vulgate: Vulgo dicitur : Si dimiserit vir uxorem suam,  et recedens ab eo duxerit virum alterum,  numquid revertetur ad eam ultra ?  numquid non polluta et contaminata erit mulier illa ?  Tu autem fornicata es cum amatoribus multis :  tamen revertere ad me, dicit Dominus,  et ego suscipiam te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֵאמֹ֡ר הֵ֣ן יְשַׁלַּ֣ח אִ֣ישׁ אֶת־אִשְׁתּוֹ֩ וְהָלְכָ֨ה מֵאִתּ֜וֹ וְהָיְתָ֣ה לְאִישׁ־אַחֵ֗ר הֲיָשׁ֤וּב אֵלֶ֙יהָ֙ ע֔וֹד הֲל֛וֹא חָנ֥וֹף תֶּחֱנַ֖ף הָאָ֣רֶץ הַהִ֑יא וְאַ֗תְּ זָנִית֙ רֵעִ֣ים רַבִּ֔ים וְשׁ֥וֹב אֵלַ֖י נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: They say, If a man put away his wife, and she go from him, and become another man’s, shall he return unto her again? shall not that land be greatly polluted? but thou hast played the harlot with many lovers; yet return again to me, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Leva oculos tuos in directum,  et vide ubi non prostrata sis.  In viis sedebas,  exspectans eos quasi latro in solitudine :  et polluisti terram in fornicationibus tuis, et in malitiis tuis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׂאִי־עֵינַ֨יִךְ עַל־שְׁפָיִ֜ם וּרְאִ֗י אֵיפֹה֙ לֹ֣א (שגלת) [שֻׁכַּ֔בְתְּ] עַל־דְּרָכִים֙ יָשַׁ֣בְתְּ לָהֶ֔ם כַּעֲרָבִ֖י בַּמִּדְבָּ֑ר וַתַּחֲנִ֣יפִי אֶ֔רֶץ בִּזְנוּתַ֖יִךְ וּבְרָעָתֵֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: Lift up thine eyes unto the high places, and see where thou hast not been lien with. In the ways hast thou sat for them, as the Arabian in the wilderness; and thou hast polluted the land with thy whoredoms and with thy wickedness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quam ob rem prohibitæ sunt stillæ pluviarum,  et serotinus imber non fuit.  Frons mulieris meretricis facta est tibi ;  noluisti erubescere.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּמָּנְע֣וּ רְבִבִ֔ים וּמַלְק֖וֹשׁ ל֣וֹא הָיָ֑ה וּמֵ֨צַח אִשָּׁ֤ה זוֹנָה֙ הָ֣יָה לָ֔ךְ מֵאַ֖נְתְּ הִכָּלֵֽם׃
verses.king_james: Therefore the showers have been withholden, and there hath been no latter rain; and thou hadst a whore’s forehead, thou refusedst to be ashamed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ergo saltem amodo voca me :  Pater meus, dux virginitatis meæ tu es :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲל֣וֹא מֵעַ֔תָּה (קראתי) [קָרָ֥את] לִ֖י אָבִ֑י אַלּ֥וּף נְעֻרַ֖י אָֽתָּה׃
verses.king_james: Wilt thou not from this time cry unto me, My father, thou art the guide of my youth?

verses.latin_vulgate: numquid irasceris in perpetuum,  aut perseverabis in finem ?  ecce locuta es, et fecisti mala, et potuisti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲיִנְטֹ֣ר לְעוֹלָ֔ם אִם־יִשְׁמֹ֖ר לָנֶ֑צַח הִנֵּ֥ה דִבַּ֛רְתְּ וַתַּעֲשִׂ֥י הָרָע֖וֹת וַתּוּכָֽל׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Will he reserve his anger for ever? will he keep it to the end? Behold, thou hast spoken and done evil things as thou couldest.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Dominus ad me in diebus Josiæ regis :   Numquid vidisti quæ fecerit aversatrix Israël ?  Abiit sibimet super omnem montem excelsum,  et sub omni ligno frondoso,  et fornicata est ibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהֹוָ֜ה אֵלַ֗י בִּימֵי֙ יֹאשִׁיָּ֣הוּ הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ הֲֽרָאִ֔יתָ אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשְׂתָ֖ה מְשֻׁבָ֣ה יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל הֹלְכָ֨ה הִ֜יא עַל־כׇּל־הַ֣ר גָּבֹ֗הַּ וְאֶל־תַּ֛חַת כׇּל־עֵ֥ץ רַעֲנָ֖ן וַתִּזְנִי־שָֽׁם׃
verses.king_james: The Lord said also unto me in the days of Josiah the king, Hast thou seen that which backsliding Israel hath done? she is gone up upon every high mountain and under every green tree, and there hath played the harlot.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixi, cum fecisset hæc omnia :  Ad me revertere :  et non est reversa.  Et vidit prævaricatrix soror ejus Juda
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֹמַ֗ר אַחֲרֵ֨י עֲשׂוֹתָ֧הּ אֶת־כׇּל־אֵ֛לֶּה אֵלַ֥י תָּשׁ֖וּב וְלֹא־שָׁ֑בָה (ותראה) [וַתֵּ֛רֶא] בָּגוֹדָ֥ה אֲחוֹתָ֖הּ יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And I said after she had done all these things, Turn thou unto me. But she returned not. And her treacherous sister Judah saw it.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia pro eo quod mœchata esset aversatrix Israël,  dimisissem eam,  et dedissem ei libellum repudii :  et non timuit prævaricatrix Juda soror ejus,  sed abiit, et fornicata est etiam ipsa :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֵ֗רֶא כִּ֤י עַל־כׇּל־אֹדוֹת֙ אֲשֶׁ֤ר נִֽאֲפָה֙ מְשֻׁבָ֣ה יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל שִׁלַּחְתִּ֕יהָ וָאֶתֵּ֛ן אֶת־סֵ֥פֶר כְּרִיתֻתֶ֖יהָ אֵלֶ֑יהָ וְלֹ֨א יָרְאָ֜ה בֹּגֵדָ֤ה יְהוּדָה֙ אֲחוֹתָ֔הּ וַתֵּ֖לֶךְ וַתִּ֥זֶן גַּם־הִֽיא׃
verses.king_james: And I saw, when for all the causes whereby backsliding Israel committed adultery I had put her away, and given her a bill of divorce; yet her treacherous sister Judah feared not, but went and played the harlot also.

verses.latin_vulgate: et facilitate fornicationis suæ contaminavit terram,  et mœchata est cum lapide et ligno :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָה֙ מִקֹּ֣ל זְנוּתָ֔הּ וַתֶּחֱנַ֖ף אֶת־הָאָ֑רֶץ וַתִּנְאַ֥ף אֶת־הָאֶ֖בֶן וְאֶת־הָעֵֽץ׃
verses.king_james: And it came to pass through the lightness of her whoredom, that she defiled the land, and committed adultery with stones and with stocks.

verses.latin_vulgate: et in omnibus his non est reversa ad me  prævaricatrix soror ejus Juda  in toto corde suo,  sed in mendacio, ait Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַם־בְּכׇל־זֹ֗את לֹא־שָׁ֨בָה אֵלַ֜י בָּגוֹדָ֧ה אֲחוֹתָ֛הּ יְהוּדָ֖ה בְּכׇל־לִבָּ֑הּ כִּ֥י אִם־בְּשֶׁ֖קֶר נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And yet for all this her treacherous sister Judah hath not turned unto me with her whole heart, but feignedly, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Dominus ad me : Justificavit animam suam aversatrix Israël, comparatione prævaricatricis Judæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֵלַ֔י צִדְּקָ֥ה נַפְשָׁ֖הּ מְשֻׁבָ֣ה יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל מִבֹּגֵדָ֖ה יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto me, The backsliding Israel hath justified herself more than treacherous Judah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vade, et clama sermones istos contra aquilonem, et dices :  Revertere, aversatrix Israël, ait Dominus,  et non avertam faciem meam a vobis,  quia sanctus ego sum, dicit Dominus,  et non irascar in perpetuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָלֹ֡ךְ וְֽקָרָ֩אתָ֩ אֶת־הַדְּבָרִ֨ים הָאֵ֜לֶּה צָפ֗וֹנָה וְ֠אָמַרְתָּ֠ שׁ֣וּבָה מְשֻׁבָ֤ה יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֔ה לוֹא־אַפִּ֥יל פָּנַ֖י בָּכֶ֑ם כִּֽי־חָסִ֤יד אֲנִי֙ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֔ה לֹ֥א אֶטּ֖וֹר לְעוֹלָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Go and proclaim these words toward the north, and say, Return, thou backsliding Israel, saith the Lord; and I will not cause mine anger to fall upon you: for I am merciful, saith the Lord, and I will not keep anger for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen scito iniquitatem tuam,  quia in Dominum Deum tuum prævaricata es,  et dispersisti vias tuas alienis sub omni ligno frondoso,  et vocem meam non audisti, ait Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֚ךְ דְּעִ֣י עֲוֺנֵ֔ךְ כִּ֛י בַּיהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהַ֖יִךְ פָּשָׁ֑עַתְּ וַתְּפַזְּרִ֨י אֶת־דְּרָכַ֜יִךְ לַזָּרִ֗ים תַּ֚חַת כׇּל־עֵ֣ץ רַעֲנָ֔ן וּבְקוֹלִ֥י לֹֽא־שְׁמַעְתֶּ֖ם נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Only acknowledge thine iniquity, that thou hast transgressed against the Lord thy God, and hast scattered thy ways to the strangers under every green tree, and ye have not obeyed my voice, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Convertimini, filii revertentes, dicit Dominus,  quia ego vir vester :  et assumam vos unum de civitate,  et duos de cognatione,  et introducam vos in Sion.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שׁ֣וּבוּ בָנִ֤ים שֽׁוֹבָבִים֙ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֔ה כִּ֥י אָנֹכִ֖י בָּעַ֣לְתִּי בָכֶ֑ם וְלָקַחְתִּ֨י אֶתְכֶ֜ם אֶחָ֣ד מֵעִ֗יר וּשְׁנַ֙יִם֙ מִמִּשְׁפָּחָ֔ה וְהֵבֵאתִ֥י אֶתְכֶ֖ם צִיּֽוֹן׃
verses.king_james: Turn, O backsliding children, saith the Lord; for I am married unto you: and I will take you one of a city, and two of a family, and I will bring you to Zion:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dabo vobis pastores juxta cor meum,  et pascent vos scientia et doctrina.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַתִּ֥י לָכֶ֛ם רֹעִ֖ים כְּלִבִּ֑י וְרָע֥וּ אֶתְכֶ֖ם דֵּעָ֥ה וְהַשְׂכֵּֽיל׃
verses.king_james: And I will give you pastors according to mine heart, which shall feed you with knowledge and understanding.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque multiplicati fueritis,  et creveritis in terra in diebus illis, ait Dominus,  non dicent ultra :  Arca testamenti Domini :  neque ascendet super cor, neque recordabuntur illius,  nec visitabitur, nec fiet ultra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֡ה כִּ֣י תִרְבּוּ֩ וּפְרִיתֶ֨ם בָּאָ֜רֶץ בַּיָּמִ֤ים הָהֵ֙מָּה֙ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֔ה לֹא־יֹ֣אמְרוּ ע֗וֹד אֲרוֹן֙ בְּרִית־יְהֹוָ֔ה וְלֹ֥א יַעֲלֶ֖ה עַל־לֵ֑ב וְלֹ֤א יִזְכְּרוּ־בוֹ֙ וְלֹ֣א יִפְקֹ֔דוּ וְלֹ֥א יֵעָשֶׂ֖ה עֽוֹד׃
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass, when ye be multiplied and increased in the land, in those days, saith the Lord, they shall say no more, The ark of the covenant of the Lord: neither shall it come to mind: neither shall they remember it; neither shall they visit it; neither shall that be done any more.

verses.latin_vulgate: In tempore illo vocabunt Jerusalem solium Domini :  et congregabuntur ad eam omnes gentes  in nomine Domini in Jerusalem,  et non ambulabunt post pravitatem cordis sui pessimi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּעֵ֣ת הַהִ֗יא יִקְרְא֤וּ לִירוּשָׁלַ֙͏ִם֙ כִּסֵּ֣א יְהֹוָ֔ה וְנִקְו֨וּ אֵלֶ֧יהָ כׇֽל־הַגּוֹיִ֛ם לְשֵׁ֥ם יְהֹוָ֖ה לִירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וְלֹא־יֵלְכ֣וּ ע֔וֹד אַחֲרֵ֕י שְׁרִר֖וּת לִבָּ֥ם הָרָֽע׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: At that time they shall call Jerusalem the throne of the Lord; and all the nations shall be gathered unto it, to the name of the Lord, to Jerusalem: neither shall they walk any more after the imagination of their evil heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: In diebus illis ibit domus Juda ad domum Israël,  et venient simul de terra aquilonis  ad terram quam dedi patribus vestris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּיָּמִ֣ים הָהֵ֔מָּה יֵלְכ֥וּ בֵית־יְהוּדָ֖ה עַל־בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְיָבֹ֤אוּ יַחְדָּו֙ מֵאֶ֣רֶץ צָפ֔וֹן עַל־הָאָ֕רֶץ אֲשֶׁ֥ר הִנְחַ֖לְתִּי אֶת־אֲבוֹתֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: In those days the house of Judah shall walk with the house of Israel, and they shall come together out of the land of the north to the land that I have given for an inheritance unto your fathers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego autem dixi :  Quomodo ponam te in filios,  et tribuam tibi terram desiderabilem,  hæreditatem præclaram exercituum gentium ?  Et dixi : Patrem vocabis me,  et post me ingredi non cessabis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָנֹכִ֣י אָמַ֗רְתִּי אֵ֚יךְ אֲשִׁיתֵ֣ךְ בַּבָּנִ֔ים וְאֶתֶּן־לָךְ֙ אֶ֣רֶץ חֶמְדָּ֔ה נַחֲלַ֥ת צְבִ֖י צִבְא֣וֹת גּוֹיִ֑ם וָאֹמַ֗ר אָבִי֙ (תקראו) [תִּקְרְאִי־]לִ֔י וּמֵאַחֲרַ֖י לֹ֥א (תשובו) [תָשֽׁוּבִי]׃
verses.king_james: But I said, How shall I put thee among the children, and give thee a pleasant land, a goodly heritage of the hosts of nations? and I said, Thou shalt call me, My father; and shalt not turn away from me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed quomodo si contemnat mulier amatorem suum,  sic contempsit me domus Israël,  dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָכֵ֛ן בָּגְדָ֥ה אִשָּׁ֖ה מֵרֵעָ֑הּ כֵּ֣ן בְּגַדְתֶּ֥ם בִּ֛י בֵּ֥ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Surely as a wife treacherously departeth from her husband, so have ye dealt treacherously with me, O house of Israel, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vox in viis audita est,  ploratus et ululatus filiorum Israël :  quoniam iniquam fecerunt viam suam ;  obliti sunt Domini Dei sui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֚וֹל עַל־שְׁפָיִ֣ים נִשְׁמָ֔ע בְּכִ֥י תַחֲנוּנֵ֖י בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל כִּ֤י הֶעֱווּ֙ אֶת־דַּרְכָּ֔ם שָׁכְח֖וּ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: A voice was heard upon the high places, weeping and supplications of the children of Israel: for they have perverted their way, and they have forgotten the Lord their God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Convertimini, filii revertentes,  et sanabo aversiones vestras.  Ecce nos venimus ad te :  tu enim es Dominus Deus noster.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שׁ֚וּבוּ בָּנִ֣ים שׁוֹבָבִ֔ים אֶרְפָּ֖ה מְשׁוּבֹתֵיכֶ֑ם הִנְנוּ֙ אָתָ֣נוּ לָ֔ךְ כִּ֥י אַתָּ֖ה יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃
verses.king_james: Return, ye backsliding children, and I will heal your backslidings. Behold, we come unto thee; for thou art the Lord our God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vere mendaces erant colles,  et multitudo montium :  vere in Domino Deo nostro salus Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָכֵ֥ן לַשֶּׁ֛קֶר מִגְּבָע֖וֹת הָמ֣וֹן הָרִ֑ים אָכֵן֙ בַּיהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵ֔ינוּ תְּשׁוּעַ֖ת יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: Truly in vain is salvation hoped for from the hills, and from the multitude of mountains: truly in the Lord our God is the salvation of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confusio comedit laborem patrum nostrorum ab adolescentia nostra :  greges eorum, et armenta eorum,  filios eorum, et filias eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַבֹּ֗שֶׁת אָ֥כְלָ֛ה אֶת־יְגִ֥יעַ אֲבוֹתֵ֖ינוּ מִנְּעוּרֵ֑ינוּ אֶת־צֹאנָם֙ וְאֶת־בְּקָרָ֔ם אֶת־בְּנֵיהֶ֖ם וְאֶת־בְּנוֹתֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: For shame hath devoured the labour of our fathers from our youth; their flocks and their herds, their sons and their daughters.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dormiemus in confusione nostra,  et operiet nos ignominia nostra :  quoniam Domino Deo nostro peccavimus nos, et patres nostri,  ab adolescentia nostra usque ad diem hanc :  et non audivimus vocem Domini Dei nostri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נִשְׁכְּבָ֣ה בְּבׇשְׁתֵּ֗נוּ וּֽתְכַסֵּ֘נוּ֮ כְּלִמָּתֵ֒נוּ֒ כִּי֩ לַיהֹוָ֨ה אֱלֹהֵ֜ינוּ חָטָ֗אנוּ אֲנַ֙חְנוּ֙ וַאֲבוֹתֵ֔ינוּ מִנְּעוּרֵ֖ינוּ וְעַד־הַיּ֣וֹם הַזֶּ֑ה וְלֹ֣א שָׁמַ֔עְנוּ בְּק֖וֹל יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: We lie down in our shame, and our confusion covereth us: for we have sinned against the Lord our God, we and our fathers, from our youth even unto this day, and have not obeyed the voice of the Lord our God.
